== Notes for [[Item:Q98442|Q98442]] ==

* [http://mechon-mamre.org/p/pt/pt25a03.htm#19 1 Chronicles 3:19-20.] The division of Zerubbabel's children into two lists implies that he had two (or more) wives.

I would love to find an actual source!

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBCE12CF1EFBBF89829A6488A4D3A3B
geni:6000000038589664949

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
